text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 30 (prior to the 2023 file, the length was 12) 

FILE(S): APR Affiliated Groups 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: alphanumeric character string (e.g., A1233445, 758002). 

COMMENT: The submitting state's unique identifier for the group. The group will also appear in the provider data 
set as a provider (i.e., the group-as-a-provider).
